content_of_post_to_answer: How can I move on from my first ever ex? We go to the same class. We both are 17 right now. I just want to be focused and not distracted due to her.
answer: Moving on from a first relationship is difficult because you are not only losing a person, you are losing a version of your daily life and identity built around them. Since you share a class, the goal is not to erase her presence but to reduce the emotional meaning attached to it. Healing comes when she becomes someone you know, not someone your mind keeps revisiting. Distance helps, but acceptance helps more: you can care about someone and still choose to grow beyond them.
